name: Decision Pack
description: Multi-role underwriting workflow around a canonical Decision Pack shared by founder, investor, reviewer, attorney, and operator.

business-info.md.description: Company narrative, ICP, product summary, and operating context

strategy.md.description: Target investor thesis, diligence priorities, and readiness thresholds

current-data.md.description: Current evidence, traction metrics, and receipts under review

personal-info.md.description: Workflow preferences, reviewer policy norms, and operating roles

founder: Create and assess a new FluxHalo submission.
Show me the current working state and the next best founder step.
Answer the top diligence blocker with these excerpts: ...
investor: Attach a diligence question asking why this will be defensible against fast followers.
Show me the current governed submission and the open diligence pressure.
reviewer: Show me the current working state for reviewer action.
Hold the active material change for policy review.
attorney: Show me the current submission and any legal or disclosure-sensitive changes.
Add a note that investor-facing materials must disclose the new pricing structure.
operator: Show the operator overview for the governed state.
What is the next best surface and why?
